briefdescription.para: This function is a stub for the asynchronous callback.

detaileddescription.para: The stub is here in case the upper layer forgot to set the handlers. On initialization, all handlers are set to this callback. It is considered an error for this handler to be invoked.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions, and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the HDMI TX core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the HDMI TX core. Initialization of the HDMI TX includes setting up the instance data and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the HDMI TX core.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if HDMI TX PIO ID mismatched.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the AXI4-Lite Clock Frequency.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
specifies the value that needs to be set.

simplesect.para: This is required after a reset or init.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the core into HDMI mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

simplesect.para: This is required after a reset or init.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the core into DVI mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

simplesect.para: This is required after a reset or init.

briefdescription.para: This function clear the HDMI TX variables and sets it to the defaults.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

simplesect.para: This is required after a reset or init.

briefdescription.para: This function provides video identification code of video mode.

parameterdescription.para: specifies resolution identifier.

simplesect.para: Video identification code defined in the VIC table.

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_HdmiTx *InstancePtr, XVidC_VideoMode VideoMode, XVidC_ColorFormat ColorFormat, XVidC_ColorDepth Bpc)
memberdef.name: XV_HdmiTx_GetTmdsClk

briefdescription.para: This function sets and return the TMDS Clock based on Video Parameter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
specifies resolution identifier.

specifies the type of color format.
0 = XVIDC_CSF_RGB
1 = XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444
2 = XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422
3 = XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_420

specifies the color depth/bits per color component.
6 = XVIDC_BPC_6
8 = XVIDC_BPC_8
10 = XVIDC_BPC_10
12 = XVIDC_BPC_12
16 = XVIDC_BPC_16

briefdescription.para: This function controls the scrambler.

detaileddescription.para: Requires TMDSClock to be up to date in order to force enable scrambler when TMDSClock > 340MHz.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function controls the TMDS clock ratio.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function detects connected sink is a HDMI 2.0/HDMI 1.4 sink device and sets appropriate flag in the TX stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function shows the sinks SCDC registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_HdmiTx *InstancePtr, XVidC_VideoMode VideoMode, XVidC_ColorFormat ColorFormat, XVidC_ColorDepth Bpc, XVidC_PixelsPerClock Ppc, XVidC_3DInfo *Info3D)
memberdef.name: XV_HdmiTx_SetStream

briefdescription.para: This function sets the HDMI TX stream parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
specifies resolution identifier.

specifies the type of color format.
0 = XVIDC_CSF_RGB
1 = XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444
2 = XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422
3 = XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_420

specifies the color depth/bits per color component.
6 = XVIDC_BPC_6
8 = XVIDC_BPC_8
10 = XVIDC_BPC_10
12 = XVIDC_BPC_12
16 = XVIDC_BPC_16

specifies the pixel per clock.
1 = XVIDC_PPC_1
2 = XVIDC_PPC_2
4 = XVIDC_PPC_4
is a pointer to 3D info structure or NULL for 2D.

simplesect.para: TmdsClock, reference clock calculated based on the input parameters.

inbodydescription.para: In HDMI the colordepth in YUV422 is always 12 bits, although on the link itself it is being transmitted as 8-bits. Therefore if the colorspace is YUV422, then force the colordepth to 12 bits.

briefdescription.para: This function asserts or releases the HDMI TX Internal VRST.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either assert or release HDMI TX Internal VRST.

simplesect.para: The reset output of the PIO is inverted. When the system is in reset, the PIO output is cleared and this will reset the HDMI TX. Therefore, clearing the PIO reset output will assert the HDMI Internal video reset. C-style signature: void XV_HdmiTx_INT_VRST(XV_HdmiTx *InstancePtr, u8 Reset)

briefdescription.para: This function asserts or releases the HDMI TX Internal LRST.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either assert or release HDMI TX Internal LRST.

simplesect.para: The reset output of the PIO is inverted. When the system is in reset, the PIO output is cleared and this will reset the HDMI TX. Therefore, clearing the PIO reset output will assert the HDMI Internal link reset. C-style signature: void XV_HdmiTx_INT_VRST(XV_HdmiTx *InstancePtr, u8 Reset)

briefdescription.para: This function asserts or releases the HDMI TX External VRST.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either assert or release HDMI TX External VRST.

simplesect.para: The reset output of the PIO is inverted. When the system is in reset, the PIO output is cleared and this will reset the HDMI TX. Therefore, clearing the PIO reset output will assert the HDMI external video reset. C-style signature: void XV_HdmiTx_EXT_VRST(XV_HdmiTx *InstancePtr, u8 Reset)

briefdescription.para: This function asserts or releases the HDMI TX External SYSRST.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either assert or release HDMI TX External SYSRST.

simplesect.para: The reset output of the PIO is inverted. When the system is in reset, the PIO output is cleared and this will reset the HDMI TX. Therefore, clearing the PIO reset output will assert the HDMI External system reset. C-style signature: void XV_HdmiTx_EXT_SYSRST(XV_HdmiTx *InstancePtr, u8 Reset)

briefdescription.para: This function sets the HDMI TX AUX GCP register AVMUTE bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function clears the HDMI TX AUX GCP register AVMUTE bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the HDMI TX AUX GCP register CLEAR_AVMUTE bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function clears the HDMI TX AUX GCP register CLEAR_AVMUTE bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the pixel rate at output.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the sample rate at output.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

specifies the value that needs to be set.
2 samples per clock
3 samples per clock.
5 samples per clock.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the color format.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the color depth.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function prepares TX DDC peripheral to use.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
specifies the value that needs to be set.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the acknowledge flag.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

simplesect.para: Acknowledge flag value from DDC status register.

briefdescription.para: This function waits for the done flag to be set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if done flag is set.

briefdescription.para: This function writes data into the command fifo.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
is the command value to write to the DDC command FIFO.

briefdescription.para: This function reads data from the data fifo.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

simplesect.para: Data byte read from the DDC data FIFO.

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_HdmiTx *InstancePtr, u8 Slave, u16 Length, u8 *Buffer, u8 Stop)
memberdef.name: XV_HdmiTx_DdcWrite

briefdescription.para: This function writes data from DDC peripheral from given slave address.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
specifies the slave address from where data needs to be read.
specifies number of bytes to be read.
specifies a pointer to u8 variable that will be filled with data.
specifies the stop flag which is either TRUE/FALSE.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if an acknowledgement received and timeout.

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_HdmiTx *InstancePtr, u8 Slave, u16 Length, u8 *Buffer, u8 Stop)
memberdef.name: XV_HdmiTx_DdcRead

briefdescription.para: This function reads data from DDC peripheral from given slave address.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
specifies the slave address from where data needs to be read.
specifies number of bytes to be read.
specifies a pointer to u8 variable that will be filled with data.
specifies the stop flag which is either TRUE/FALSE.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if an acknowledgement received and timeout.

briefdescription.para: This function transmits the infoframes generated by the processor.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if AUX FIFO is full.

briefdescription.para: This function prints stream and timing information on STDIO/Uart console.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function provides status of the stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function provides the stream connected status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the active audio channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
is the number of active audio channels (2, 4, 6, 8, 12, 24, 32).

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if active channels were set.
XST_FAILURE if no active channels were set.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the active audio format.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.
is the audio format type to set.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if audio format was set.
XST_FAILURE if audio format was not set.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the active audio format.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx core instance.

simplesect.para: Active audio format of HDMI Tx

briefdescription.para: This is the main file for Xilinx HDMI TX core.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xv_hdmitx.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 10/07/15 Initial release. 1.01 yh 15/01/16 Add 3D Support 1.02 MG 09/03/16 Added XV_HdmiTx_SetHdmiMode and XV_HdmiTx_SetDviMode 1.03 YH 25/07/16 Used UINTPTR instead of u32 for BaseAddress XV_HdmiTx_CfgInitialize 1.04 YH 27/07/16 Remove checking VideoMode<(XVIDC_VM_NUM_SUPPORTED)); 1.05 YH 17/08/16 Add XV_HdmiTx_SetAxiClkFreq Move XV_HdmiTx_DdcInit to XV_HdmiTx_SetAxiClkFreq squash unused variable compiler warning 1.06 MG 07/03/17 Updated XV_HdmiTx_Auxsend with packet ready check 1.07 YH 19/07/17 Added Video Masking Check API 1.08 YH 06/10/17 Added function XV_HdmiTx_SetAudioFormat and function XV_HdmiTx_GetAudioFormat EB 10/10/17 Updated XV_HdmiTx_Scrambler to always enable scrambler for HDMI 2.0 resolutions 1.09 MMO 19/12/17 Added XV_HdmiTx_SetTmdsClk API 2.00 YH 16/01/18 Added dedicated reset for each clock domain Added bridge unlock interrupt Added PIO_OUT to set GCP_AVMUTE EB 18/01/18 Moved VicTable to Hdmi Common library Updated function XV_HdmiTx_SetTmdsClk and renamed to XV_HdmiTx_GetTmdsClk Updated function XV_HdmiTx_SetStream Moved VicTable, XV_HdmiTx_Aux to Hdmi Common library EB 23/01/18 Updated XV_HdmiTx_SetAudioChannels to fix an issue where setting audio channel value will unmute the audio regardless of the current status 2.02 MMO 11/08/18 Added Bridge Overflow and Bridge Underflow (PIO IN) EB 14/08/18 Updated XV_HdmiTx_CfgInitialize to initialize HPD pulse periods 2.03 EB 28/03/19 Disable PIO Interrupt for XV_HdmiTx_DdcWrite and XV_HdmiTx_DdcRead APIs to prevent another DDC transactions from happening in the middle of a DDC transaction EB 16/07/19 Replaced sampling rate of 4 with 2 at the API XV_HdmiTx_SetSampleRate 2.50 EB 02/12/18 Added 3D Audio Support
